section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. Selections are black-filled cells. 4 asset columns, all SP. Transaction row is one continuous black band across all four columns (null). Value of Asset row C ($1,001-$15,000) is a continuous black band across all four columns. Type of Income: Dividends filled for the two middle columns (NKE, NVDA); Capital Gains filled across all four. Amount of Income: E ($2,501-$5,000) filled for NKE only; F ($5,001-$15,000) filled for NFLX, NVDA, PYPL (F band has a white gap at the NKE column).

uncertainties.read: entire Transaction row black-filled across all 4 columns
